data.title: Ethereum Launches Hoodi Testnet for Pectra Upgrade
data.description:
The Ethereum Foundation has announced the launch of a new testnet, Hoodi, to complete the testing of the Pectra upgrade. This move follows previous attempts on the Sepolia and Holesky testnets, which encountered several configuration issues. The Hoodi testnet is scheduled to go live on March 17, providing a final opportunity to demonstrate the code update before its deployment on the mainnet.

The Pectra upgrade introduces several significant changes to the Ethereum network, aimed at making it faster, more efficient, and more user-friendly. One of the most notable improvements is the addition of smart contract functionality to addresses, allowing user wallets to be programmed with new features such as paying transaction fees in currencies other than ETH. This upgrade is crucial for enhancing the network's scalability and improving staking flexibility.

Tim Beiko, the coordinator of the Ethereum ecosystem’s core developers at the Ethereum Foundation, highlighted the importance of the Hoodi testnet. He stated that if the test is successful, developers will launch the upgrade after 30 days, subject to further testing. If everything proceeds as planned, Ethereum users can expect the Pectra upgrade to launch on the mainnet by April or May.

The complications encountered on the Sepolia and Holesky testnets underscore the challenges faced during the testing phase. These test networks are designed to mirror the Ethereum mainnet but are free to use and do not support real value. Upgrades like Pectra are implemented on these test networks before being deployed on the mainnet to avoid potential disruptions. The Pectra setback comes at a time when Ethereum is facing significant pressure due to declining ETH prices and growing competition from newer chains.

The Pectra upgrade includes several key enhancements, such as account abstraction (EIP-7702), which allows users to pay transaction fees in currencies other than ETH. Additionally, the upgrade introduces roll-out Staking Enhancements (EIP-7251), increasing the validator staking limit from 32 to 2048 ETH. Other major EIPs include EIP-7691, which proposes an update to improve scalability and reduce network congestion, EIP-7623, which enhances privacy by allowing users to hide specific transaction details, EIP-2537, which optimizes contract execution, reducing gas costs and improving smart contract efficiency, and EIP-7549, which improves interoperability between different Ethereum Layer2 networks.

The launch of the Hoodi testnet is a critical step in the preparation for the Pectra upgrade, ensuring that the Ethereum network can handle the changes effectively. Ethereum core developers have emphasized the importance of thorough testing to identify and address any potential issues before the upgrade is deployed on the mainnet. The successful implementation of the Pectra upgrade will depend on the comprehensive testing conducted on the Hoodi testnet, providing a stable and efficient network for developers and users alike.

data.title: GoPlus's Remediation Plan Boosts GPS Token 18% in 24 Hours
data.description:
GPS, the native token of the GoPlus ecosystem, experienced a significant surge in value, increasing by over 18% within a 24-hour period. As of the latest data, GPS is currently trading at $0.04, marking a notable rebound in its market performance. This surge comes on the heels of a remediation and improvement plan announced by GoPlus on March 11th. The plan outlines a commitment to use 4.34 million USDT to repurchase GPS tokens and an additional $2 million for user compensation over the next 90 days. This strategic move is aimed at stabilizing the ecosystem and restoring investor confidence.

The recent price surge of GPS can be attributed to the positive market sentiment generated by GoPlus's remediation plan. The plan's focus on token repurchase and user compensation signals a proactive approach to addressing past issues and ensuring the long-term sustainability of the GoPlus ecosystem. This initiative has likely reassured investors, leading to increased buying activity and the subsequent price increase. The market capitalization of GPS has also rebounded to $75 million, reflecting the renewed interest and trust in the token.

GoPlus's decision to allocate a substantial amount of USDT for token repurchase and user compensation is a strategic move that aims to mitigate the impact of previous challenges faced by the ecosystem. By repurchasing GPS tokens, GoPlus can reduce the circulating supply, potentially driving up the token's value. Additionally, the compensation fund demonstrates a commitment to supporting users who may have been affected by past issues, further enhancing the ecosystem's credibility and attractiveness to new investors.

The positive market response to GoPlus's remediation plan underscores the importance of transparency and proactive measures in the cryptocurrency space. As the ecosystem continues to implement its plan, it will be crucial for GoPlus to maintain open communication with its community and deliver on its promises. This approach will not only help in rebuilding trust but also in fostering a more resilient and sustainable ecosystem for the future.

data.title: Bitcoin Struggles as Gold Hits Record High, Crypto Market Pulls Back
data.description:
Bitcoin has recently faced significant challenges, struggling to surpass the $84,000 resistance level amidst a broader crypto market pullback. Meanwhile, gold has surged to a record high of $3,000 per ounce, highlighting a stark contrast in performance between the two assets. This shift has raised questions about the sustainability of the current crypto bull run.

The year 2025 has been tumultuous for Bitcoin, with the cryptocurrency experiencing a decline of over 10% year-to-date, dropping from approximately $94,000 in January to around $84,000. In contrast, gold has seen a nearly 13% increase during the same period, underscoring its resilience and appeal as a safe-haven asset.

Market analysts have noted that Bitcoin is beginning to breach a critical support line against gold, a trend that has held for over a decade. This development, if sustained, could signal the end of the current crypto bull run. The underperformance of Bitcoin relative to gold is further evidenced by the contrasting capital flows into their respective exchange-traded funds (ETFs).

US-based spot gold ETFs have attracted significant inflows, exceeding $6 billion year-to-date, while globally, spot gold ETFs have seen over $23 billion in inflows. Conversely, US-based spot Bitcoin ETFs have experienced nearly $1.5 billion in net outflows, indicating a shift in investor sentiment towards risk-off assets. Several factors, including new trade tariffs, hawkish monetary policies, and recent stock market volatility, have contributed to this aversion to risk-on assets.

The underperformance of Bitcoin relative to gold has cast doubt on the longevity of the current crypto bull market. The total crypto market cap has decreased by over $600 billion since the start of the year, now standing at approximately $2.8 trillion. Renowned gold advocate Peter Schiff argues that Bitcoin has been in a bear market for the past three years, with its value in terms of gold having fallen by 24% since its peak in 2021.

However, positive macroeconomic developments could still turn the tide in Bitcoin's favor. Cooling US inflation may pressure the Federal Reserve to pivot towards quantitative easing, boosting market liquidity and potentially benefiting risk-on assets. Additionally, a breakdown in the US dollar index could reignite optimism for assets like stocks and cryptocurrencies. At the time of writing, Bitcoin is trading at $84,902, up 3.8% in the past 24 hours, suggesting that the market remains dynamic and subject to rapid changes.

data.title: Bitcoin’s Safe-Haven Status Questioned Amid Market Volatility
data.description:
Bitcoin’s role in the financial landscape is undergoing a significant transformation, with its narrative shifting from a safe-haven asset to a speculative one. This evolution is driven by recent market dynamics that challenge Bitcoin’s reliability during economic turmoil. Initially hailed as “digital gold,” Bitcoin has increasingly shown correlations with risky assets, often moving inversely to traditional safe-haven assets like gold. This shift has led many to question its status as a secure investment, especially in times of financial uncertainty.

Bitcoin’s characterization as a safe-haven asset is increasingly contested as it reacts similarly to traditional risk assets in times of economic uncertainty. The crypto market has experienced substantial volatility, and recent trends indicate that institutional adoption has not cemented Bitcoin’s status as a secure investment. Rather, it has drawn closer correlations with equities, often moving in tandem with broader market sentiments and liquidity cycles. This dual identity is further complicated by the participation of traditional finance giants like blackrock and Fidelity, which have included Bitcoin in their portfolios. However, this does not inherently make Bitcoin safer; such participation could amplify Bitcoin’s volatility, drawing it deeper into the realm of speculative assets.

Bitcoin can embody two contrasting narratives: as a short-term risk asset and as a long-term store of value. The volatile nature of Bitcoin’s price does not negate its potential as a long-term hold against inflation, especially as it has historically outperformed gold and other equities over time. However, its susceptibility to drastic price swings raises questions about its reliability during economic downturns. The growing retail adoption of Bitcoin, especially during significant market events, reflects its potential as a long-term store of value. As Acheson pointed out, Bitcoin’s performance over extended timeframes is noteworthy; it continues to attract investors who view it as a hedge against inflation and fiat currency devaluation. “BTC has always had two key narratives: a risk asset sensitive to market conditions and a long-term asset that can hold its ground against economic pressures,” she elaborated.

The cryptocurrency market is facing hurdles as inflation concerns and economic slowdown loom large. Despite these challenges, Bitcoin’s fundamentals suggest a favorable long-term outlook. A significant consideration for investors is identifying the next major catalyst to stimulate a sustained upward trend in Bitcoin’s price, as highlighted by Adam Kobeissi. The ongoing struggle in general markets reflects a broader sentiment of caution among investors. As the landscape for cryptocurrencies continues to evolve, some observers remain optimistic about Bitcoin’s role in an investment portfolio. While the asset currently exhibits risk characteristics, future economic scenarios may indeed favor its growth as a long-term store of value. “Given the ETF acceptance and growing regulatory clarity, Bitcoin may find its footing again as a hedge against traditional market risks,” suggested industry analysts.

Bitcoin’s journey from a perceived safe haven to a risk asset illustrates the dynamic nature of financial markets. While its short-term volatility remains a concern, its potential as a long-term asset capable of preserving value is still debated among experts. As the market continues to adapt, investors should remain vigilant and adaptable, recognizing both the risks and the opportunities that Bitcoin presents in their portfolios.

data.title: Ether Faces 52% Drop, Whale Accumulation May Prevent Further Decline
data.description:
Ether, the world's second-largest cryptocurrency, is facing a critical juncture as analysts warn of a potential fall below the $1,900 demand zone. This zone, identified as "robust" by onchain metrics, has historically seen significant buying activity, with around 4.3 million ETH purchased in the $1,848–$1,905 range. If Ether breaches this level, it could trigger a wave of selling, known as capitulation, where investors panic and sell their positions, leading to a significant price decline.

Capitulation, while initially detrimental, often signals an imminent market bottom and the start of the next uptrend. In Ether's case, this could catalyze a recovery from its three-month downtrend, during which its price fell over 52% from a peak above $4,100 on December 16, 2024. However, the risk of capitulation increases if Ether falls below the $1,900 level, as demand beyond this zone appears much thinner.

Despite the potential for a temporary correction below $1,900, analysts believe that Ether is unlikely to fall much lower due to growing whale accumulation. Whales, or large investors, have been accumulating Ether, and substantial amounts of ETH are held by these large players and institutions. This behavior was also seen in recent options data, where larger players were positioning themselves for moves in either direction, indicating market uncertainty about Ether's future price movements.

Whale addresses with at least 1,000 ETH or $1.92 million have started staging a recovery since the beginning of 2025. The number of these addresses rose over 4% year-to-date, from 4,652 addresses on January 1 to over 4,843 addresses on March 14. This accumulation by whales suggests that there is significant interest in Ether, which could support its price and prevent a further decline.

In conclusion, while Ether faces the risk of falling below the $1,900 demand zone and potential capitulation, the growing whale accumulation and historical buying activity in this zone suggest that a significant price decline is unlikely. Instead, this scenario could catalyze a recovery from Ether's three-month downtrend and signal an imminent market bottom. However, the market remains uncertain about Ether's future price movements, and investors should proceed with caution.

data.title: Dawgz AI Raises $2.6M in Presale, Combining AI Trading with Meme Culture
data.description:
New crypto coins are emerging rapidly, but not all of them are worth investing in. Some are merely hype, while others offer genuine potential for growth. Among the new entrants, Dawgz AI stands out as a top contender. This crypto project is designed for serious gains, combining AI-powered trading with meme culture to attract both traders and long-term holders.

Dawgz AI offers several key features that set it apart from other meme coins. It includes AI-powered trading bots that operate 24/7, hunting for profits even while investors sleep. Additionally, it provides staking rewards for ETH holders, allowing them to earn passive income simply by holding $DAGZ tokens. The tokenomics of Dawgz AI are also robust, with a total supply of 8.888 billion tokens allocated for presale, staking, and liquidity. The project has already raised over $2.6 million in its presale, with the next target set at $2.63 million, indicating strong momentum and an impending price increase.

Another notable new crypto coin is Popcat (POP), which has gained attention due to its feline-inspired theme. Drawing inspiration from the viral "Popcat" meme, this coin has transitioned from internet humor to a significant player in the crypto market. However, while Popcat leverages its meme origins to engage a broad audience, it lacks the advanced features and staking rewards offered by Dawgz AI.

Cats in a Dogs World (MEW) is another feline-themed token aiming to carve its niche among dog-dominated meme coins. Launched on the Solana blockchain, MEW seeks to captivate both cat enthusiasts and crypto investors. However, MEW offers a unique cat-centric narrative but does not integrate advanced community engagement strategies like Dawgz AI, which provides both entertainment and tangible utility to investors.

In summary, while the market is full of meme coins fighting for attention, not all of them have real value. Some are just hype, while others actually give investors a shot at long-term growth. Dawgz AI stands out as a meme coin with real utility, combining AI-powered trading with community engagement. It offers staking rewards, a strong tokenomics model, and a rapidly growing presale, making it a strong contender for significant growth in the crypto market.

data.title: Lightchain AI Raises $17.3M in Presale, Eyes Pi Coin-like Surge
data.description:
Lightchain AI, a cryptocurrency project that integrates artificial intelligence with blockchain technology, has captured the attention of investors due to its low presale price of $0.006. The project has successfully raised over $17.3 million, sparking excitement and speculation about its potential to replicate the explosive surge experienced by pi Coin. The low entry price offers investors a rare opportunity to participate before an anticipated price increase, making it an attractive option for those looking to invest in a promising project.

Lightchain AI's innovative approach combines decentralized AI tasks with blockchain technology through its unique Proof of Intelligence (PoI) consensus mechanism. This mechanism rewards AI computations, positioning Lightchain AI as a scalable solution for real-world applications. Unlike meme coins such as Shiba Inu, which rely heavily on community hype and speculative investment, Lightchain AI offers tangible utility. This technological foundation attracts investors seeking long-term growth and sustainability, setting it apart from projects that lack a clear use case.

The project's presale phase has already raised over $16.4 million, indicating strong investor confidence and growing interest. With its innovative technological advancements and an exciting roadmap, Lightchain AI has the potential to see massive appreciation as its utility and adoption expand. This positions it as a strong contender for significant growth in the coming years, making it a top investment choice for 2025 and beyond.

Lightchain AI has the potential to follow a growth trajectory similar to Pi Coin, leveraging cross-industry collaboration and positioning AI as a tool for equity. Its blockchain-powered AI solutions enable secure and seamless integration across industries such as finance, healthcare, and logistics, empowering businesses with decentralized intelligence. The platform’s AI task scalability supports the efficient execution of complex machine learning models, making it highly suited for real-world AI applications. Additionally, its staking mechanism for governance allows token holders to actively participate in decision-making, fostering a transparent and community-driven ecosystem.

Unlike centralized AI systems, Lightchain AI decentralizes AI model training, ensuring fairness, reducing biases, and prioritizing data privacy. This decentralized approach democratizes access to advanced AI, moving away from control by a select few corporations and creating a more equitable landscape. With its focus on real-world adoption, scalability, and decentralized governance, Lightchain AI is well-positioned to gain significant traction, potentially achieving a market breakout comparable to the success of Pi Coin.

As Lightchain AI attracts attention and investor interest, its potential to replicate Pi Coin’s explosive growth becomes clear. Backed by a team of AI and blockchain experts, the project is well-positioned for success. With its low entry price, strong momentum, and innovative vision, Lightchain AI is set to make an impact in the crypto space. As interest grows, it has the potential to follow Pi Coin’s path, offering substantial returns to early adopters.

data.title: Pi Network Price Drops 25% Amid Pi Domains Surge
data.description:
The pi Network, a cryptocurrency project designed to democratize digital currency, has recently experienced a significant price drop, falling to $1.45. This decline coincides with a surge in interest for pi domains, which are decentralized web addresses operating on the Pi Network blockchain. The heightened activity around Pi Domains has sparked discussions about the potential for the Pi Network's price to rebound above the $2 mark.

The Pi Network, launched in 2019, aims to create a user-friendly cryptocurrency that can be mined using a mobile app. The project has garnered millions of users globally, but it has also faced criticism and skepticism regarding its long-term sustainability and price volatility. The recent price drop can be attributed to several factors, including the overall volatile market sentiment towards cryptocurrencies and the increased activity on the Pi Network due to the rush for Pi Domains.

In a recent development, the Pi Network announced the launch of .pi domains, allowing users to bid exclusively using Pi Coins. This event, which began on Pi Day (March 14) and will continue until Pi2Day (June 28, 2025), represents a significant step for the Pi ecosystem. The auction creates a real-world utility case for the cryptocurrency, as users need to use Pi Coins to bid on and purchase domains with real-world meaning and purpose. All proceeds from the auction will be reinvested into the Pi ecosystem to support developer programs, events, and initiatives that enhance Pi’s utility.

Soon after the announcement, .pi domains linked to top firms such as tesla, Samsung, and amazon were bid on using a single wallet address, with a total expenditure of 60,000 Pi Coins. This activity highlights the growing interest in Pi domains and showcases the platform’s potential to create a competitive marketplace centered around exclusive naming rights within the Pi Network. The auction structure for .pi domains includes a dynamic timeframe for individual domain bidding, with specific domain auctions being extended if new bids are placed within 24 hours of their scheduled conclusion.

Despite the current challenges, there are reasons to be optimistic about the Pi Network's future. The project has a strong community of supporters and developers committed to its success. The introduction of Pi Domains represents a significant step forward in the network's development, expanding the use cases for the Pi cryptocurrency beyond simple transactions. The Pi Network's price recovery will depend on several factors, including market sentiment, the success of Pi Domains, and the network's ability to attract new users and developers. If the project can continue to innovate and build a strong ecosystem, it may be able to overcome the current selling pressure and achieve its goal of making digital currency accessible to everyone. However, it is important to note that the cryptocurrency market is inherently volatile, and there are no guarantees of success. Investors should approach the Pi Network with caution and conduct thorough research before making any investment decisions.

data.title: Nvidia GTC Conference Preview: Blockbuster B300 on the Way, Ultimate Goal to AGI
data.description:
NVIDIA is set to hold the GTC 2025 conference in San Jose, California, from March 17 to 21, where it will unveil the latest breakthroughs in AI chips, deployment, and applications. With DeepSeek making waves recently, the focus will be on how the GPU maker navigates AI to advance further toward Artificial General Intelligence (AGI).

This year's GTC will feature over 1,000 sessions covering fields such as LLM model training and deployment, AI applications, AI-driven pharmaceutical research, content creation, AR/VR, conversational AI, cybersecurity, edge computing, robotics, physics, and more. The event will showcase cutting-edge AI technologies across multiple domains.

The most anticipated event will be nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's keynote on March 18, where he will discuss what's next in agentic AI, robotics, and accelerated computing. There is strong speculation that he will unveil the new B300 chip, the GB300 AI server, and the next-generation Rubin computing architecture, laying out NVIDIA's product roadmap for the next two to three years.

This product launch comes at a time of turbulence in the U.S. stock market, with concerns over Trump's tariff policies and fears of AI compute oversupply weighing on investor sentiment. NVIDIA's stock has already dropped nearly 14% this year, retreating 25% from its all-time high in January. Historically, NVIDIA's stock has gained an average of 4.8% during the past five GTC events, and investors are eager to see whether this trend will continue or if it will help reverse the company's recent downturn.

B300: 50% Computing Boost and a Full Transition to Liquid Cooling

At last year's GTC, NVIDIA introduced the Blackwell B200 chip and the GB200 server. While initial overheating issues led to delivery delays and some order losses, the company still managed to ship $11 billion worth of Blackwell chips in the fourth quarter of 2024.

Now, Huang is set to unveil the much more powerful B300, also known as Blackwell Ultra, which is expected to begin shipping as soon as May, with broader availability in the second half of 2025.

The B300 will continue using the Blackwell architecture and feature eight 12-Hi HBM3E stacks, increasing total memory to 288GB, a 50% jump from the B200. FP4 floating-point computing performance is also expected to improve by 50%.

To support these GPUs, NVIDIA will introduce the Mellanox Spectrum Ultra X800 Ethernet switch, which features a 512-radix architecture and supports up to 512 ports. This upgrade will significantly enhance AI and high-performance computing (HPC) systems.

However, higher performance will come with increased power consumption. The B300 chip inside the GB300 server is projected to reach a TDP of 1,400W, compared to 1,200W for the previous generation. To address this challenge, NVIDIA is expected to fully transition to liquid cooling, equipping each chip with its own dedicated cooling plate. 

Next-Generation Rubin Architecture: A Leap Toward AGI

In addition to the B300, Huang is expected to unveil NVIDIA's next-generation Rubin architecture, which is scheduled for release in 2026. This will mark another major step toward AGI.

Rubin will feature eight stacks of HBM4E memory, offering up to 288GB of capacity. It will integrate a Vera CPU, NVLink 6 switches with a bandwidth of 3,600 GB/s, CX9 network adapters with speeds of 1,600 Gb/s, and X1600 switches. Huang has described Rubin as a groundbreaking leap in performance and capabilities.

Huang may also provide a glimpse into post-Rubin products, such as Rubin Ultra, which is expected to launch in 2027. Rubin Ultra is rumored to feature 12 stacks of HBM4E memory, increasing total capacity to 576GB. HBM4E technology is set to deliver unprecedented bandwidth and memory capacity, which will be critical for handling increasingly complex AI models and computational tasks.

The introduction of Rubin raises concerns about AI compute oversupply. DeepSeek recently built its R1 inference model at a fraction of OpenAI's cost, demonstrating that AI inference is evolving beyond sheer compute expansion.

Huang has emphasized that AI is shifting from generative AI to inference-based and logical reasoning AI. Unlike one-shot inference, long-term reasoning AI may require 100 times more compute per task. This shift reinforces NVIDIA's argument for sustained demand for AI hardware.

Agentic AI and Robotics: The Next Frontier

Beyond accelerated computing, Huang's keynote will also highlight the potential of agentic AI and robotics.

Agentic AI, or AI agents, is an emerging trend where AI systems are designed to autonomously handle complex problem-solving and automate repetitive tasks. Many major tech firms are heavily investing in this field, and Huang is expected to showcase NVIDIA's advancements in simplifying toolchains and improving efficiency.

Discussions around robotics have gained momentum recently, but high costs and commercialization challenges remain significant hurdles. At CES 2024, NVIDIA introduced the Isaac GR00T Blueprint, a platform that enables developers to generate large-scale synthetic datasets with minimal human demonstration, facilitating imitation learning for humanoid robots.

At present, NVIDIA's focus remains on AI training rather than mass-producing robots. However, Huang's decision to include robotics in his keynote suggests that there may be new developments in the field.

NVIDIA's First Quantum Day: How Soon Will "Useful" Quantum Computing Arrive?

Another key highlight of GTC 2025 will be NVIDIA's first-ever Quantum Day on March 20, featuring leading figures from the quantum computing industry.

Huang previously predicted that a very useful quantum computer might still be 15 years away, a statement that sparked debate among industry experts. The Quantum Forum will explore how soon quantum computing will achieve real-world applications and its implications for human progress. This discussion is expected to attract significant interest.

With the B300, Rubin, and agentic AI in focus, NVIDIA is gearing up for another monumental GTC. However, given the current concerns about an oversupply of AI hardware and market uncertainty, investors will be closely watching whether this event can help reignite NVIDIA's stock momentum.

data.title: MoonPay Secures Wisconsin Money Transmission License, Expands US Operations
data.description:
MoonPay, a prominent cryptocurrency payment platform, has secured a Money Transmission License (MTL) from the Wisconsin Department of financial institutions. This significant achievement allows MoonPay to expand its operations within the state, providing residents with access to its services, including the ability to reload their MoonPay Balance at no additional cost.

The MTL is a crucial regulatory milestone for MoonPay, as it strengthens the company's compliance with U.S. regulations. This license enables MoonPay to legally offer money transmission services in Wisconsin, ensuring that its operations adhere to state regulations. The expansion into Wisconsin is part of MoonPay's broader strategy to drive its nationwide growth by complying with local financial regulations.

With this license, MoonPay can now more efficiently provide its cryptocurrency payment services in the region. The MTL not only allows MoonPay to operate legally within Wisconsin but also enhances its credibility and trustworthiness among users and regulatory bodies. This development is expected to further drive MoonPay's expansion across the United States, as the company continues to navigate the complex regulatory landscape of the cryptocurrency industry.

MoonPay's acquisition of the MTL in Wisconsin is a testament to its commitment to regulatory compliance and its dedication to expanding its services across the United States. By obtaining this license, MoonPay has demonstrated its ability to meet the stringent requirements set by state financial institutions, paving the way for future growth and innovation in the cryptocurrency payment sector.

data.title: XRP Surges 4.25% as Analysts Predict Bullish Trend Above $2.83
data.description:
XRP, the cryptocurrency, has recently shown signs of ending its correction phase, with analysts predicting a significant price surge. According to various analysts, XRP must close above $2.83 to confirm its strength and target $4.20 next. Key support levels at $2.22 and $2.04 are expected to prevent a bearish breakdown below these levels. A break below the Fibonacci 0.888 level may trigger a dip before a bullish recovery.

Analyst Dark Defender believes that XRP has completed its correction and is expected to target $2.42 first. The key supports are at $2.22 and $2.04, while Dark Defender sees potential for a move towards $4.2932 and $5.8563. This prediction is based on XRP’s ability to sustain momentum above the Ichimoku cloud, a critical indicator for trend confirmation.

Meanwhile, EGRAG CRYPTO highlights the significance of the Blue channel, which has established an equilibrium at its lower boundary. This technical structure suggests that a rebound is imminent, setting the stage for three potential short-term scenarios. For XRP to confirm a macro uptrend, it must close above $2.83. Achieving this level would signal strength and open the door to a $4.20 price target. As time progresses, these targets could shift higher, further reinforcing the bullish sentiment.

Despite the optimism, a retracement remains a possibility. XRP may retest the Previous Daily Low (PDL), which lines up with the Fibonacci 0.888 level. This area provides strong support, but a sustained break below for three days or more could indicate continued bearish pressure. If the level holds, traders should monitor key levels, including the Previous Daily High (PDH) at $2.40, Previous Weekly High (PWH) at $2.97, and Previous Monthly High (PMH) at $3.07. Higher closing prices will reinforce market confidence and structural strength.

In a pessimistic case, if XRP breaks below the Fibonacci 0.888 level and the PDL, a decline toward the Fibonacci 0.786 level may occur. This could lead to a fair value gap fill. However, EGRAG CRYPTO believes this scenario may be a bear trap, potentially aligning with Bitcoin’s retest of $70,000. If true, XRP could experience a false breakout before resuming its upward trajectory.

At press time, XRP is trading at $2.41, reflecting a 4.25% increase over the past 24 hours. Over the last seven days, the cryptocurrency has gained 3.37%, showing resilience despite market fluctuations. With a circulating supply of 58 billion XRP, the asset boasts a market capitalization of $139,825,634,580.

data.title: Shiba Inu Open Interest Surges 8.9% Amid Price Consolidation
data.description:
Shiba Inu (SHIB) has recently experienced a period of price consolidation, with its open interest surging by 8.9% in the past 24 hours. This increase in open interest, which represents the total number of outstanding derivative contracts, indicates a growing interest in SHIB among traders and speculators. The total value of SHIB in outstanding derivatives contracts has reached approximately $117.82 million, with holders opening a total of 9.18 trillion SHIB.

This uptick in open interest signals renewed confidence among SHIB holders that the gains of the last seven days could continue. Despite facing bearish pressure recently, SHIB has maintained an upward trajectory, albeit slowly. As of the latest data, the SHIB price was trading at $0.00001280, representing a 1.23% increase in the last 24 hours. This rise is significant given the recent challenges the meme coin has faced, including a breach of the $0.000010 support level. However, the token quickly recovered, as seen in the current price action.

Gate.io accounted for nearly three-quarters of the open interest figures, with traders on the exchange committing 6.76 trillion SHIB, or 73.47% of the cumulative amount, valued at $86.56 million. Other notable exchanges that saw increased interest were OKX with 1.03 trillion SHIB and Bitget with 874.55 billion SHIB. This distribution of open interest across various exchanges suggests a broad-based interest in SHIB, rather than concentration in a single platform.

Analysts have projected that Shiba Inu might experience a 63% breakout based on the Bollinger Bands hint. This technical indicator suggests that SHIB is either oversold or about to experience a price reversal. Market observers maintain that SHIB’s performance in the next couple of days will determine whether its recovery will linger. They opine that stabilizing the price with the burn mechanism could contribute to its resurgence. The burn mechanism, which involves permanently removing SHIB tokens from circulation, is seen as a potential catalyst for price appreciation by reducing the overall supply.

Investors are also speculating about the potential impact of various factors on SHIB's price. For instance, if the value of one SHIB were to equal 10,000 Dogecoin, SHIB's price could skyrocket to around $1.60. This hypothetical scenario highlights the significant potential for price appreciation that some investors see in SHIB. However, it is important to note that such a scenario is purely speculative and depends on a variety of market conditions and investor sentiment.

The recent developments in SHIB's open interest and price consolidation have sparked discussions among investors about the cryptocurrency's future prospects. Some investors believe that SHIB has the potential to become a millionaire-maker cryptocurrency, given its past performance and the growing interest in the meme coin market. In 2021, SHIB experienced a remarkable surge, increasing by 45,278,000% and attracting a large number of investors. This past performance has fueled optimism among some investors about SHIB's future potential.

However, it is essential to approach such speculation with caution. The cryptocurrency market is known for its volatility, and past performance is not always indicative of future results. Investors should conduct thorough research and consider various factors, including market trends, regulatory developments, and technological advancements, before making investment decisions. The recent surge in SHIB's open interest and price consolidation is just one piece of the puzzle, and investors should consider the broader market context when evaluating SHIB's potential.

data.title: Cryptocurrencies Dawgz AI, WIF, PEPE, FET, SUI Attract Investors During Market Dips
data.description:
Cryptocurrency markets are known for their volatility, and savvy investors often look for opportunities to buy during dips. Recently, several cryptocurrencies have been highlighted as potential bargains for smart investors seeking to capitalize on market downturns. These include Dawgz AI, Dogwifhat (WIF), PEPE, FET, and sui, each offering unique features and potential for growth.

Dawgz AI stands out as a meme coin with AI-powered trading capabilities. Its neural network analyzes market data points efficiently, making it a strong contender in volatile conditions. The presale for Dawgz AI is already attracting significant interest, with funds raised nearing $3 million. The coin's community-driven approach and growing momentum make it a prime candidate for early investors looking for substantial returns.

Dogwifhat (WIF) is another meme coin that has shown resilience despite market fluctuations. Powered by the Solana blockchain, WIF benefits from high-speed, low-fee transactions. Its strong community backing and major listings on prominent exchanges contribute to its liquidity and trading volume, making it a reliable choice for meme coin enthusiasts.

PEPE, an Ethereum-based meme coin, has garnered significant attention with its massive market cap and high trading volume. Despite being a relatively new entrant, PEPE has proven its staying power by maintaining relevance and attracting billions in daily trading activity. Its strong performance during market dips positions it as a potential long-term investment for meme coin enthusiasts.

FET, an AI-powered blockchain, focuses on decentralized AI automation and interoperability. Its real-world applications in AI and enterprise adoption make it a promising investment in the long term. FET's ability to connect multiple blockchains seamlessly and its use in various AI applications position it as a strong contender in the cryptocurrency sector.

SUI, designed for handling massive traffic without lag, is ideal for DeFi, gaming, and Web3 applications. Its fast transactions, smart contract support, and scalability make it a top choice for investors looking to accumulate during a dip. SUI's ability to handle millions of users without congestion positions it as a reliable and efficient blockchain solution.

When comparing these cryptocurrencies, it is clear that each offers unique advantages. Dawgz AI's strong presale growth and AI-powered trading capabilities make it an attractive option for early investors. Dogwifhat (WIF) and PEPE, with their strong community backing and high liquidity, are reliable choices for meme coin traders. FET's focus on AI and Web3, along with its real-world applications, positions it as a long-term investment. SUI's scalable Layer-1 technology makes it a top choice for DeFi and Web3 builders.

Investors looking to capitalize on market dips should consider these cryptocurrencies, each offering potential for significant returns. However, it is essential to remember that all investments carry high risk, especially in the volatile cryptocurrency market. Strategic dip buying, setting price alerts, and dollar-cost averaging can help mitigate risks and amplify returns. By carefully selecting undervalued cryptocurrencies and employing a proven dip buying strategy, investors can position themselves for success in the ever-changing cryptocurrency landscape.

data.title: Binance Launches mubarak Token, Price Surges 50% Post-CEO Meme
data.description:
Binance, a prominent global cryptocurrency exchange, has introduced a new initiative called "Binance Alpha Launch mubarak," which has captured the attention of the crypto community. This launch is part of Binance's ongoing efforts to engage with its user base and promote community involvement within the cryptocurrency ecosystem.

The "Binance Alpha Launch mubarak" initiative includes the introduction of a new token, mubarak, which was launched on March 13, 2025. The token's price experienced a significant surge following a post by Binance CEO Zhao Changpeng on Binance Square, where he shared a meme featuring the token. This sudden spike in interest underscores the impact of community engagement and social media on the cryptocurrency market.

Binance Wallet, a crucial component of the Binance ecosystem, has also announced an exclusive Token Generation Event (TGE) as part of the "Binance Alpha Launch mubarak" initiative. This event aims to provide early access to new projects, fostering innovation and growth within the Binance community. The TGE is open for early project applications, encouraging developers and entrepreneurs to participate and contribute to the ecosystem.

In addition to the token launch and TGE, Binance has organized a Ramadan Giveaway on Binance Square from March 14 to 28. Users can complete tasks and engage with Binance's 2025 Ramadan Calendar for a chance to win various prizes. This initiative not only celebrates the cultural significance of Ramadan but also encourages user engagement and participation within the Binance community.

The "Binance Alpha Launch mubarak" initiative also includes the community takeover of the mubarak meme, which was originally launched on the Four.meme platform. The community has taken over the development of the meme, fostering a sense of ownership and collaboration among users. This community-driven approach aligns with Binance's mission to create a decentralized and inclusive cryptocurrency ecosystem.

Overall, the "Binance Alpha Launch mubarak" initiative demonstrates Binance's commitment to innovation, community engagement, and cultural inclusivity. By launching new tokens, organizing giveaways, and fostering community-driven projects, Binance continues to lead the way in the cryptocurrency industry.

data.title: The Latest Possible Victim To Fall To Trump's 'Tariff War' - Tesla
data.description:
According to media reports, on March 11, tesla warned in a letter to the Office of the U.S. Trade Representative (USTR) that President Trump's trade war could make it a target for retaliatory tariffs and increase the cost of manufacturing cars in the United States.

The letter highlights that even Tesla, led by Trump's close ally Elon Musk, is concerned about the potential impact of widespread tariffs.

Previously, Trump appointed Musk as the head of the newly established Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), under the leadership of the U.S. federal government, which is undergoing an unprecedented downsizing.

Tesla stated that it is crucial to ensure that the Trump administration's efforts to address trade issues do not inadvertently harm U.S. companies. The company expressed its eagerness to avoid the kind of retaliation faced during previous trade disputes, which led to countries affected by tariffs raising import duties on electric vehicles.

US exporters are inherently exposed to disproportionate impacts when other countries respond to US trade actions, Tesla said in the letter. The assessment undertaken by the United States Trade Representative (USTR) of potential actions to rectify unfair trade should also take into account exports from the United States. For example, past trade actions by the United States have resulted in immediate reactions by the targeted countries, including increased tariffs on electric vehicles imported into those countries.

Trump is considering imposing high tariffs on cars and auto parts produced worldwide as early as April.

Tesla warned that even with aggressive supply chain localization efforts, certain components are difficult or impossible to source domestically in the U.S. The company also emphasized that it has been reforming its global supply chain to localize production as much as possible.

As a US manufacturer and exporter, Tesla encourages the Office of the United States Trade Representative (USTR) to consider the downstream impacts of certain proposed actions taken to address unfair trade practices, Tesla stated in the letter.

Autos Drive America, a trade association representing major foreign automakers such as Toyota, Volkswagen, BMW, Honda, and Hyundai, also warned the USTR that broad-based tariffs will disrupt production at U.S. assembly plants.

The group added, Automakers cannot shift their supply chains overnight, and cost increases will inevitably lead to some combination of higher consumer prices, fewer models offered to consumers, and shut-down U.S. production lines, leading to potential job losses across the supply chain.

Due to Musk's close relationship with Trump and his role in the U.S. government, Tesla's public image and global sales have been severely damaged. Since the beginning of this year, Tesla's stock price has fallen by 40%.

Tesla is not the only Musk-led company facing retaliation due to tariffs. Last month, Doug Ford, the Premier of Ontario, Canada, announced the cancellation of a contract with Musk's SpaceX satellite internet company Starlink in response to tariffs.

data.title: Bitcoin Surges 2.913% to $84,142, Faces Short-Term Resistance
data.description:
Bitcoin has experienced a significant price increase, rising by 2.913% in the past 24 hours, with the current price at $84,142. However, analysts caution that this surge may face short-term resistance, particularly between $84,000 and $85,000. This resistance level could potentially hinder further price increases in the immediate future. Despite this, the key support level at $75,000 has held firm, indicating a stable foundation for the cryptocurrency's value.

If Bitcoin manages to break through the $85,000 mark, it could potentially advance towards the $90,000 level. However, investors are advised to closely monitor market liquidity and institutional fund flows, as these factors can significantly influence Bitcoin's price movements. For long-term investors, the current market conditions present an opportunity to gradually build positions. Analysts suggest that the $75,000-$78,000 range offers strong support, making it an ideal entry point for those looking to accumulate Bitcoin over the long term.

The recent decline in consumer confidence may signal a weakening economic activity, which could impact the demand for risk assets like Bitcoin. This economic uncertainty adds an additional layer of complexity to the cryptocurrency market, as investors weigh the potential risks and rewards of holding Bitcoin. Despite these challenges, the long-term outlook for Bitcoin remains positive, with many analysts predicting continued growth and adoption in the years to come.

In summary, while Bitcoin faces short-term resistance and potential economic headwinds, the cryptocurrency's strong support levels and long-term growth prospects make it an attractive investment for those willing to take a patient approach. By carefully monitoring market conditions and gradually building positions, investors can position themselves to benefit from Bitcoin's continued rise in value.

data.title: Solana's Price Surges 89% ETF Approval Likely, But Pullback Looms
data.description:
Solana's price has shown significant strength in recent days, entering a critical resistance zone. This surge is largely attributed to the growing optimism surrounding the token, particularly the high probability of an ETF approval this year. With an 89% chance of ETF approval, Solana is expected to experience a substantial rally, potentially reaching a four-digit figure. This optimism is further fueled by Solana's outperformance in decentralized exchange (DEX) activity and volume compared to other platforms, indicating its rising popularity.

Despite these positive indicators, there are concerns that Solana's price may experience a pullback to $125. The future markets, which significantly influence upcoming price movements, have seen a notable drop in Open Interest (OI) and volume. This suggests that spot traders are uncertain about the future price action, leading to lower volatility and price consolidation within a narrow range. Additionally, the increase in short trades indicates a bearish sentiment among future traders, who anticipate a potential price plunge to $130 and later to $128.

The weekly chart of Solana's price further supports this bearish outlook. The price has dropped below a rising parallel channel and failed to reclaim levels, despite consistent buying pressure and bullish interventions. The weekly Relative Strength Index (RSI) is also plunging, suggesting a probable pullback. If Solana fails to reclaim the support levels before the weekend, its price is likely to drop back to $125.

In conclusion, while the high probability of an ETF approval and Solana's outperformance in dex activity and volume suggest a bullish outlook, the current market data and technical indicators point to a potential pullback. The future price action of Solana will depend on its ability to reclaim support levels and overcome the bearish sentiment in the market.

data.title: RED Soars 42% in 24 Hours, Market Cap Surpasses $200M
data.description:
RED, a prominent cryptocurrency, has witnessed a substantial increase in its value, rising by over 42% in the last 24 hours. As of the latest data, red is trading at $0.73, marking a significant milestone in its market performance. This surge has not only pushed its market capitalization above $200 million but has also garnered considerable attention from investors and market analysts.

The dramatic rise in RED's value can be attributed to several key factors. Firstly, the cryptocurrency market is inherently volatile, and RED's recent performance exemplifies this characteristic. The market's unpredictable nature often leads to sudden spikes and drops in the value of various cryptocurrencies, including RED. Secondly, the growing interest in decentralized finance (DeFi) and blockchain technology has driven up the demand for cryptocurrencies. As more individuals and institutions recognize the potential of these technologies, the demand for cryptocurrencies like RED has surged, contributing to its price increase.

However, it is crucial for investors to approach this market with caution. The cryptocurrency market's volatility means that the value of RED could fluctuate significantly in the coming days. Investors are advised to conduct thorough research and consider the potential risks before making any investment decisions. The recent surge in RED's value serves as a reminder of the market's potential for substantial gains, but it also underscores the inherent risks involved.

In summary, RED's recent performance highlights the potential for significant gains in the cryptocurrency market. The surge in its value is a testament to the increasing interest in DeFi and blockchain technology. As the market continues to evolve, it is likely that more cryptocurrencies will experience similar gains. However, investors must remain vigilant and informed to navigate the market's volatility effectively.

data.title: Tech Giants Battle for Scarce AI Talent to Dominate LLMs
data.description:
In the fiercely competitive realm of artificial intelligence, tech giants valued at hundreds of billions of dollars are locked in a battle to recruit AI scientists with the specialized skills required to achieve dominance in Large Language Models (LLMs). The global pool of such highly skilled professionals is extremely limited, with fewer than 1,000 individuals possessing the necessary expertise.

The scarcity of top-tier AI talent has sparked an intense competition, with companies offering generous compensation packages and attractive perks to lure these specialists. The high demand for AI scientists proficient in LLMs is fueled by the transformative potential these models hold across various sectors, including healthcare, finance, and more. The ability to develop and implement advanced LLMs can provide a substantial competitive advantage, making the acquisition of such talent a critical strategic goal for these tech giants.

This talent war extends beyond financial incentives; it also involves creating an environment that encourages innovation and creativity. Companies are investing significantly in research and development, establishing cutting-edge labs, and providing opportunities for collaboration with leading academic institutions. This comprehensive approach aims to attract and retain the brightest minds in the field, enabling them to focus on advancing AI technology.

The broader implications of this talent competition are vast. The development of sophisticated LLMs has the potential to revolutionize society, impacting areas such as education and entertainment. As these models become more advanced, they could automate complex tasks, improve decision-making processes, and even generate new forms of art and literature. The companies that succeed in attracting and retaining top AI talent will be at the forefront of this technological revolution, influencing the future of AI and its applications.

However, the intense competition for AI talent also raises concerns about the concentration of power and expertise within a few large corporations. This could lead to a widening gap between those who have access to advanced AI technologies and those who do not, exacerbating existing inequalities. It is essential for policymakers and industry leaders to address these challenges and ensure that the benefits of AI are distributed equitably across society.

In summary, the high-stakes competition among tech companies for AI scientists with LLM expertise underscores the transformative potential of this technology. As these companies vie to secure the best talent, they are also shaping the future of AI and its societal impact. The outcome of this competition will have far-reaching consequences, influencing the trajectory of technological innovation and the distribution of its benefits.

data.title: Mutuum Finance Sees 25% Price Hike in Phase 3, 200% Return Expected on Listing
data.description:
Mutuum Finance (MUTM) and Pepe Coin (PEPE) are two cryptocurrencies that have garnered significant attention due to their potential for substantial growth, reminiscent of Shiba Inu’s (SHIB) remarkable 16,000% surge. Mutuum Finance, currently in Phase 3 of its presale, has already amassed $3.3 million and attracted 5,600 holders. The token is priced at $0.02, with expectations of a 25% increase to $0.025 in the next phase and a potential 200% return upon listing at $0.06. Some analysts predict that the token’s value could climb even higher, potentially reaching between $3 and $5, far surpassing SHIB’s growth. Meanwhile, Pepe Coin has seen a 7% increase, driven by whales investing $4.3 million, with rumors of a 215% surge circulating. However, near-term volatility remains a concern for PEPE, making MUTM’s structural model more appealing for potentially safer, exponential gains.

Mutuum Finance follows a proven presale playbook, with Phase 3 nearing capacity. Investors are encouraged to buy in at the current price of $0.02 before it climbs further. Early investors could see a 200% profit on launch day, and with a launch price estimate of $3.50, a staggering 17,400% return is possible, closely matching SHIB’s rise. The platform’s DeFi-lending toolset, including mtTokens and overcollateralized loans, drives organic demand. Ongoing revenue-based buybacks further limit supply, creating steady upward price pressure. Unlike meme coins that rely on buzz, Mutuum Finance grounds its value in genuine DeFi utility, appealing to investors seeking both growth and stability.

Pepe Coin’s recent 7% uptick was fueled by three whales purchasing 689 billion tokens. Analysts predict a potential 215% increase from its current support level of $0.0000062, but technical indicators suggest caution. PEPE remains below its 200-day moving average and is primarily driven by speculative trading, making its future uncertain. In contrast, MUTM’s systematic design fosters long-term growth through strategic tokenomics, positioning it as a more reliable investment compared to PEPE’s volatility.

Shiba Inu’s extraordinary gains in 2024 highlighted the potential for significant returns in the crypto market. Mutuum Finance, with its well-crafted DeFi 2.0 features, offers a clearer roadmap for substantial returns, potentially exceeding 4,000%. PEPE continues to navigate volatility, while MUTM’s Phase 3 presale, already 85% full, signals strong bullish sentiment. A $100,000 giveaway is adding urgency, rewarding early participants and reinforcing community trust. Additionally, Mutuum Finance is nearing completion of a CertiK audit for its smart contracts, demonstrating its commitment to security and transparency. The findings will be released via the project’s official social media outlets, underscoring its robust infrastructure.

Mutuum Finance aims to set new trends rather than simply following them. With Phase 3 winding down, the token is still available at $0.02. Investors must decide whether to rely on speculative short-term swings or secure their holdings in a framework engineered for lasting expansion. The choice is clear for those looking to capitalize on the next crypto bull cycle. For more information about Mutuum Finance, visit the official website or linktree.
